shared_v4_contract.version_strictness: v4 decoders reject v3 and unknown v4 flags; historical v3 evidence is not rewritten
shared_v4_contract.identity: catalog CRC32 plus per-region CRC32 on device; complete shelf and reconstructed-container SHA256 on host
shared_v4_contract.execution_semantics: reconstruct the original L65M container in the existing scratch and use the unchanged L65M validator and commit path

variants.record: name[8], container_off_u24, container_len_u16, container_crc32, sha256_prefix[12], flags_u8, reserved[2]
variants.c2_reuse: u24 reset-persistent staging source address only

variants.record: name[8], code_region_off_u24, code_region_len_u16, metadata_region_off_u24, metadata_region_len_u16, code_crc32, metadata_crc32, reconstructed_container_crc32, flags_u8, reserved_u8
variants.payload: immutable prefix-plus-code regions followed by load-time metadata regions in the same reset-persistent shelf artifact
variants.c2_reuse: u24 source address and the immutable-code/load-time-metadata region distinction

media_rule: No variant may require the product D81 after staging. A D81-only metadata side file is forbidden because it regresses the single-swap contract.

wave3_projection.envelope_basis: A bounded probe envelope: u24-addressable, fits the current product D81 together with the existing files, and leaves at least 379 current 1581 blocks free. It is not a release capacity authorization.
wave3_projection.success: The selected v4 variant must report its exact current bytes and remaining combined region bytes after reserving four records inside the probe envelope. No unbuilt module-size claim is permitted.

one_attempt_rule.on_any_red_gate: rollback product changes byte-for-byte; choose Wave-3 L-lite and move H/I/J behind C2; no tuning or reclaim round

separate_follow_up: The authorized 17-name review is bundled with the Wave-2 repin and is not part of this format probe.
